content.text:
{
  "dimension": "methodology-fidelity",
  "score": 3,
  "rationale": "This is Joe Hudson himself coaching, and the methodology is deployed with precision at every turn. Turn 2 inverts the question ('what's the problem with showing up just to be heard?') — a signature dissolve-the-frame move. Turn 4 deploys 'what percentage of people's input is valuable?' which is the whats-the-case-against-it / dissolve-the-scorecard question. Turn 6 self-deprecates to refuse the validator role (dont-position-yourself-as-the-source-of-validation enacted, not just avoided). Turn 8 uses mortality framing ('none of us remembered in 100 years') followed immediately by present-moment inversion ('right now somebody is having an epiphany; right now two people are fucking bored') — a textbook how-is-that-not-here-right-now deployed in inverted form. Turn 10 pivots to the actual driver (control-seeking) with what-makes-you-care-about-the-outcome. Turn 12 is embodied-experiment / frame-it-as-an-experiment ('just see what it's like... look me in the eye and say it'). Turn 14 gives back the word 'valuable' undefended, closing the loop without making it precious. Every move fits its moment; nothing is decoration; no anti-AoA frames appear.",
  "evidence_turns": [2, 4, 6, 8, 10, 12, 14],
  "turn_annotations": [
    {"turn": 2, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Invert-the-question / dissolve-the-frame: refuses the premise instead of answering it."},
    {"turn": 4, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Whats-the-case-against-it deployed as 'what percentage of people's input is valuable?' — exposes the unanswerable scorecard."},
    {"turn": 6, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Self-as-fellow-traveler-not-authority via self-deprecation; refuses validator role; repeats the dissolve-the-frame question."},
    {"turn": 8, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Dissolve-the-frame-with-mortality + how-is-that-not-here-right-now in inverted present-tense form. Names self-importance-as-defense ('if you think you have to be important, that's a selfishness of itself')."},
    {"turn": 10, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Pivots to the actual driver with what-makes-you-care-about-the-outcome / what-makes-you-want-to-control question."},
    {"turn": 12, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Embodied-experiment / frame-it-as-an-experiment: makes the control-seeking kinesthetic rather than explaining it."},
    {"turn": 14, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Gives back 'valuable' undefended; closes without extracting insight or making it precious."}
  ],
  "expected_territory_hits": ["invert-the-question", "dissolve-the-frame-with-mortality", "embodied-experiment", "self-as-fellow-traveler-not-authority", "frame-it-as-an-experiment", "self-importance-as-defense", "whats-the-case-against-it", "how-is-that-not-here-right-now", "what-makes-you-care-about-the-outcome"],
  "expected_territory_misses": [],
  "notes": "Reference exemplar from Joe himself; signature questions and frameworks deployed at exactly the right moments with no decorative use."
}
